original_abstract: We definitively show that the CO stretching response to metal coordination is driven exclusively by π polarization, which quantitatively correlates with π back-donation and changes in CO bond length and frequency.
humanized_abstract: We definitively establish that the CO stretching response to metal coordination is exclusively the consequence of π polarization, which is quantitatively associated with the extent of π back-donation and accompanied by an elongation of the CO bond and decrease in frequency.

document.output: We definitively establish that the CO stretching response to metal coordination is exclusively the consequence of π polarization, which is quantitatively associated with the extent of π back-donation and accompanied by an elongation of the CO bond and decrease in frequency.
document.input: We definitively show that the CO stretching response to metal coordination is driven exclusively by π polarization, which quantitatively correlates with π back-donation and changes in CO bond length and frequency.
